name_en: OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 26C Shoulder Bag. Denim, absolutely stunning! The Grand Palais in Paris was decorated into a dreamland, bold and innovative, denim blended with flowing chiffon, lively and unique when walking, this design is god-tier! Denim elements are still strong this season. Denim, also known as denim, has a long history, originally created for jeans, it is a cotton coarse fabric. The classic blue is deeply rooted, now developed into white, black, colorful choices. Current denim trends are retro and deconstruction, washed colors are full of retro vibes; influenced by work pants, loose jeans have large pockets on the sides, practical and stylish. Moreover, designers love to collide various elements with denim💥, adding mystery and sexy vibes. The combination of denim makes casual denim instantly dazzling, becoming the focus of the crowd. Through different fabric thicknesses, weaves, and techniques like washing, cut lines, and frayed edges, various denim items can be created!
